option.name: content
option.value: Avoid overly verbose descriptions or unnecessary details. Start with a short sentence in imperative form, no more than 50 characters long. Then leave an empty line and continue with a more detailed explanation. Write only one sentence for the first part, and two or three sentences at most for the detailed explanation. Use Conventional Commit format Use bullet points for multiple changes

project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Project.Debug.executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Publish to IIS.RadioCypress: FolderProfile.executor": "Run", "Publish to folder.x64 Single File Release.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

item.itemvalue: Publish to folder.x64 Single File Release

task.summary: Default task

Add initial project setup with visualizations and help window
This commit includes: - Core application setup (App.xaml, App.xaml.cs, AssemblyInfo.cs). - Skeleton for multiple spectrum visualizers (Equalizer, LED Matrix, Ethereal). - HelpWindow implementation for user shortcuts and station listing. - Visualization interface definition (`IVisualizer`).

feat: add Oscilloscope visualizer
Introduced a new Oscilloscope visualization mode for spectrum analysis. - Added `OscilloscopeWaveformVisualizer` implementation. - Registered Oscilloscope mode in the main application logic. - Updated keyboard shortcuts and README to include Oscilloscope mode.

feat(help): update height and add Oscilloscope shortcut
- Increased the HelpWindow height to 650 to accommodate new content. - Added "O - Oscilloscope" entry to the shortcuts list in HelpWindow.

refactor(namespace): rename to `Shawellaby.RadioCypress`
- Updated all namespaces from `RadioCypress` to `Shawellaby.RadioCypress`. - Changed the root namespace in the project file to align with the new naming convention. - Adjusted all XAML files and class references for consistency.

feat: add VU Meter visualization mode
- Implemented `VuMeterVisualizer` to provide stereo VU meter visualizations. - Extended `SpectrumVisualizationContext` to support stereo levels. - Added "V - VU Meter" shortcut to the HelpWindow and increased height to 670. - Updated application logic to include and handle the new visualization mode.

refactor: update README image paths and add visualizer previews
- Updated image paths in the README to use the `RepoAssets` directory for better organization. - Added new image previews for the currently included visualizers in the README. - Renamed and moved `RadioCypress_readmeimage_01.png` to the `RepoAssets` folder.

feat(readme): add new visualizer screenshot
- Added `RadioCypress_readmeimage_09.png` screenshot to the README for better visual representation. - Ensured the new image aligns with the existing layout of visualizer previews.

feat: add Starfield visualization mode
- Added `StarfieldSpectrumVisualizer` to provide a dynamic starfield visualization. - Updated HelpWindow to include "S - Starfield" shortcut and increased height to 690. - Registered `Starfield` mode in the main application logic and adjusted keyboard shortcuts.

feat(readme): add new sections with station presets and help images
- Updated README to include sections for Station Preset Editing, Station Selection, and Help functionality. - Added new images (`RadioCypress_readmeimage_0a.png`, `RadioCypress_readmeimage_0b.png`, and `RadioCypress_readmeimage_0c.png`) for enhanced visual representation. - Ensured consistent formatting and alignment with existing README structure.

feat(readme): add new sections with station presets and help images
- Updated README to include sections for Station Preset Editing, Station Selection, and Help functionality. - Added new images (`RadioCypress_readmeimage_0a.png`, `RadioCypress_readmeimage_0b.png`, and `RadioCypress_readmeimage_0c.png`) for enhanced visual representation. - Ensured consistent formatting and alignment with existing README structure.

chore(readme): remove unnecessary blank line
- Removed an unintended blank line in the README to maintain formatting consistency. - No functional changes were made, ensuring the document remains aligned with previous updates.

feat: add Matrix Rain visualization mode
- Implemented `MatrixRainSpectrumVisualizer` to introduce a new animated "Matrix Rain" visualization. - Updated HelpWindow with the "N - Neon Rain" shortcut and registered the new visualization mode in the application logic. - Expanded keyboard shortcut handling to support toggling the "Matrix Rain" mode.

feat(readme): add new visualizer screenshot
- Added `RadioCypress_readmeimage_10.png` to the README for enhanced visual representation. - Ensured the image aligns with the existing layout of visualizer previews to maintain consistency.

feat(readme): add new visualizer screenshot
- Added `RadioCypress_readmeimage_10.png` for improved visual representation in the README. - Ensured consistency with previously added visualizer images.

feat(readme): update image captions for clarity
- Replaced generic captions with descriptive names to improve readability and context for visualizations. - Added a new image (`RadioCypress_readmeimage_11.png`) to illustrate the "Lissajous Scope" spectrum. - Ensured all captions align with the functionality showcased by each image.

feat: add Lissajous Scope visualization mode
- Implemented `LissajousScopeVisualizer` for a new stereo visualization mode. - Added keyboard shortcut support (`X`) and updated HelpWindow accordingly. - Enhanced visualization context to supply buffered stereo samples for the new mode.

fix(readme): correct typo in image alt text
- Fixed a typo in the alt text of `RadioCypress_readmeimage_11.png`, changing "LissajousS cope" to "Lissajous Scope". - Ensured consistency in naming to match the related visualization and improve accessibility.

chore(readme): remove Matrix Rain visualizer details
- Removed outdated description of the "Matrix Rain" visualizer. - Ensured README content reflects currently supported features and visualizers. - Improved the visual consistency of the table layout after removal.

fix(help): adjust HelpWindow height for better UI fit
- Increased the height of the HelpWindow from 690 to 730. - Ensures improved content display and avoids content cutoff in the window.

MESSAGE.value:
Add initial project setup with visualizations and help window
This commit includes: - Core application setup (App.xaml, App.xaml.cs, AssemblyInfo.cs). - Skeleton for multiple spectrum visualizers (Equalizer, LED Matrix, Ethereal). - HelpWindow implementation for user shortcuts and station listing. - Visualization interface definition (`IVisualizer`).

feat: add Oscilloscope visualizer
Introduced a new Oscilloscope visualization mode for spectrum analysis. - Added `OscilloscopeWaveformVisualizer` implementation. - Registered Oscilloscope mode in the main application logic. - Updated keyboard shortcuts and README to include Oscilloscope mode.

feat(help): update height and add Oscilloscope shortcut
- Increased the HelpWindow height to 650 to accommodate new content. - Added "O - Oscilloscope" entry to the shortcuts list in HelpWindow.

refactor(namespace): rename to `Shawellaby.RadioCypress`
- Updated all namespaces from `RadioCypress` to `Shawellaby.RadioCypress`. - Changed the root namespace in the project file to align with the new naming convention. - Adjusted all XAML files and class references for consistency.

feat: add VU Meter visualization mode
- Implemented `VuMeterVisualizer` to provide stereo VU meter visualizations. - Extended `SpectrumVisualizationContext` to support stereo levels. - Added "V - VU Meter" shortcut to the HelpWindow and increased height to 670. - Updated application logic to include and handle the new visualization mode.

refactor: update README image paths and add visualizer previews
- Updated image paths in the README to use the `RepoAssets` directory for better organization. - Added new image previews for the currently included visualizers in the README. - Renamed and moved `RadioCypress_readmeimage_01.png` to the `RepoAssets` folder.

feat(readme): add new visualizer screenshot
- Added `RadioCypress_readmeimage_09.png` screenshot to the README for better visual representation. - Ensured the new image aligns with the existing layout of visualizer previews.

feat: add Starfield visualization mode
- Added `StarfieldSpectrumVisualizer` to provide a dynamic starfield visualization. - Updated HelpWindow to include "S - Starfield" shortcut and increased height to 690. - Registered `Starfield` mode in the main application logic and adjusted keyboard shortcuts.

feat(readme): add new sections with station presets and help images
- Updated README to include sections for Station Preset Editing, Station Selection, and Help functionality. - Added new images (`RadioCypress_readmeimage_0a.png`, `RadioCypress_readmeimage_0b.png`, and `RadioCypress_readmeimage_0c.png`) for enhanced visual representation. - Ensured consistent formatting and alignment with existing README structure.

feat(readme): add new sections with station presets and help images
- Updated README to include sections for Station Preset Editing, Station Selection, and Help functionality. - Added new images (`RadioCypress_readmeimage_0a.png`, `RadioCypress_readmeimage_0b.png`, and `RadioCypress_readmeimage_0c.png`) for enhanced visual representation. - Ensured consistent formatting and alignment with existing README structure.

chore(readme): remove unnecessary blank line
- Removed an unintended blank line in the README to maintain formatting consistency. - No functional changes were made, ensuring the document remains aligned with previous updates.

feat: add Matrix Rain visualization mode
- Implemented `MatrixRainSpectrumVisualizer` to introduce a new animated "Matrix Rain" visualization. - Updated HelpWindow with the "N - Neon Rain" shortcut and registered the new visualization mode in the application logic. - Expanded keyboard shortcut handling to support toggling the "Matrix Rain" mode.

feat(readme): add new visualizer screenshot
- Added `RadioCypress_readmeimage_10.png` to the README for enhanced visual representation. - Ensured the image aligns with the existing layout of visualizer previews to maintain consistency.

feat(readme): add new visualizer screenshot
- Added `RadioCypress_readmeimage_10.png` for improved visual representation in the README. - Ensured consistency with previously added visualizer images.

feat(readme): update image captions for clarity
- Replaced generic captions with descriptive names to improve readability and context for visualizations. - Added a new image (`RadioCypress_readmeimage_11.png`) to illustrate the "Lissajous Scope" spectrum. - Ensured all captions align with the functionality showcased by each image.

feat: add Lissajous Scope visualization mode
- Implemented `LissajousScopeVisualizer` for a new stereo visualization mode. - Added keyboard shortcut support (`X`) and updated HelpWindow accordingly. - Enhanced visualization context to supply buffered stereo samples for the new mode.

fix(readme): correct typo in image alt text
- Fixed a typo in the alt text of `RadioCypress_readmeimage_11.png`, changing "LissajousS cope" to "Lissajous Scope". - Ensured consistency in naming to match the related visualization and improve accessibility.

chore(readme): remove Matrix Rain visualizer details
- Removed outdated description of the "Matrix Rain" visualizer. - Ensured README content reflects currently supported features and visualizers. - Improved the visual consistency of the table layout after removal.

fix(help): adjust HelpWindow height for better UI fit
- Increased the height of the HelpWindow from 690 to 730. - Ensures improved content display and avoids content cutoff in the window.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
fix(help): adjust HelpWindow height for better UI fit
- Increased the height of the HelpWindow from 690 to 730. - Ensures improved content display and avoids content cutoff in the window.
